news.title: 2 gang members convicted on drug and gang charges in Gwinnett County
news.summary: The convictions stem from an investigation by a Gwinnett metro police drug task force that arrested both men in Lilburn for distributing methamphetamine.

news.title: Metro Atlanta officer sprays fire extinguisher to save firefighter from angry wasps
news.summary: A metro Atlanta officer came to the aid of a firefighter who stirred up a wasp’s nest.

news.title: Police chase ends in crash on woman’s front yard
news.summary: A DeKalb County homeowner is counting her blessings after a police chase came to a violent end in her front yard.

news.title: Metro Atlanta officers rescue goat from small sinkhole
Teen found dead in Atlanta was wanted in Rome for shooting
news.summary: Atlanta police have identified the teenage victim found dead days after a Fourth of July shooting in southwest Atlanta.

news.title: A 911 hang-up call. Fifteen minutes later, a metro Atlanta man was dead
Gwinnett RICO case sends two Sureño gang members to prison for 20 years
news.summary: The Gwinnett County District Attorney's Office announced a guilty verdict and sentencing Friday in a drugs/gang case.

news.title: 18-year-old indicted in DeKalb police chase that killed grandmother
news.summary: An 18-year-old has been indicted in connection with a deadly police chase that killed a DeKalb County grandmother and injured her grandson.

news.title: 18-year-old driver accused of killing grandmother while leading police on high-speed chase indicted
news.summary: The DeKalb County District Attorney's Office on Friday announced the indictment of Joseph Odeh in the death 0f 56-year-old Antoinette Catchings in April.

news.title: Alpharetta therapist charged with child cruelty in alleged incident with patient; attorney 'categorically denies' accusation
news.summary: An arrest warrant in the case alleges the victim had "visible scratches and bruises." An attorney for the accused said she "unequivocally maintains her innocence."

news.title: Suspect escapes after DeKalb police chase ends in crash
news.summary: DeKalb County police are searching for a driver who fled after a police chase ended in a crash early Friday morning.

news.title: 62-year-old charged with murder in stabbing of 65-year-old
news.summary: Ronald Davis died in a stabbing in DeKalb County in April. Police say a suspect was taken into custody this week.

news.title: Critically missing: 11-year-old reported missing in Atlanta found
news.summary: Atlanta police notified FOX 5 Atlanta around 8:40 a.m. Friday that the missing 11-year-old has been found and is safe.

news.title: Third arrest made in murder case of Atlanta man found in Douglas County reservoir
news.summary: The Douglas County Sheriff's Office said a deceased male was first recovered from Dog River Reservoir on May 15.

news.title: DeKalb County Police investigating shooting that left 1 person injured
Riverdale Police looking for 2 people accused of setting car on fire
news.summary: Security footage captured two people, appearing to be a man and a woman, intentionally starting the fire.

news.title: Car set on fire in Riverdale: Police want to talk to man, woman
news.summary: A man and woman are wanted for questioning in connection with a reported arson case Thursday involving a parked car at a Riverdale supermarket.
